issues.sample: The shift shaft torsion spring found within the transmission broke, which made gear shifting difficult or even impossible for me.  This presents an important safety hazard as it  place the me in a dangerous situation I found myself unable to change gears altogether—definitely In

narrative.headline: What 2018 Bmw G 310 R owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (100% of reports).
